chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 372 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.1353/2019 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 On 02-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioners. This Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice and as a last chance, adjourned to 11.09.2025, for which direct notice be issued to petitioners and intimation notice to their counsel.” Today, none present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. Though direct notice was issued to the petitioners and intimation notice was issued to their Counsel. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
